findings: Smoke test attempts cleanup (trap EXIT; tmux kill-session; rm -rf REPO_PATH) but does not assert teardown succeeded.
tmux kill-session uses || true, masking failures; no tmux has-session verification.
PID cleanup not tested; pids/ dirs created but no assertions that pidfiles are removed or processes stopped.
.stampede/<run_id> dirs are created in current working dir; cleanup removes only REPO_PATH, not those .stampede dirs.
Metaswarm coverage focuses on structured contract (fleet/state) but not stop/teardown semantics.
